description: Loading assets synchronously on the game loop, freezing the frame while disk I/O and decoding complete.
body: Failure mode: entering a level or spawning an object triggers a synchronous file read and asset decode on the main thread, blocking the loop for tens or hundreds of milliseconds. Detection signals: a long hitch when crossing into new areas or first using an effect; frame-time graph shows a single huge spike correlated with I/O; the game momentarily freezes. Do not load assets synchronously on the main loop. Safer fallback: bake assets to engine-ready formats at build time, load asynchronously on a worker thread or via streaming, show placeholders until ready, and keep all disk I/O off the frame's critical path.
